title: DMP Process at the University of Helsinki
author: Manninen, Soile
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In 2020, the Research Council of Finland changed its DMP submission procedure. The DMP must be submitted within 8 weeks after the positive funding decision. We present the the DMP process at the University of Helsinki: what kind of procedure and guidance does the DMP team follow when there are +100 DMPs to check in 2.5 months?
steps_raw: In 2020, the Research Council of Finland changed its DMP submission procedure. The DMP must be submitted within 8 weeks after the positive funding decision. We present the the DMP process at the University of Helsinki: what kind of procedure and guidance does the DMP team follow when there are +100 DMPs to check in 2.5 months?
keywords: Data Management Plans to provide transparency from the outset
